register.title: Create your restaurant
register.rvSub: Create your digital menu in minutes
register.trialBadge: 14-day free trial · No credit card required

register.trialDesc: No credit card required. Cancel at any time.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.heroSub: Start for free. Scale when you're ready. Cancel at any time.
pricing.faq0q: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing.faq0a: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade instantly, no fees.
pricing.faq1q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq1a: Visa/Mastercard and Mobile Money (Orange Money, MTN, Wave, Moov) via CinetPay.
pricing.faq2q: What happens at the end of the trial?
pricing.faq2a: Your account switches to the Free plan. No automatic charges.
pricing.faq3a: Yes — hosted in West Africa, encrypted at rest and in transit.

landing.heroDesc: Create an elegant QR menu for your restaurant in 5 minutes. Update prices, availability and dishes in real time from any device.
landing.trustedLabel: They manage their menu with SaeMenus
landing.featuresSub: A platform built for West African restaurateurs, easy to use from day one.
landing.feat0desc: An elegant QR code generated automatically. Your customers scan it and your menu appears in one second on their phone.
landing.feat1desc: Edit prices, availability and new dishes from your smartphone. Changes are visible instantly.
landing.feat2desc: Invite your cashiers with their own access. Each role has permissions suited to their responsibilities.
landing.feat3desc: Every change is logged with timestamp, user and change details. Total transparency.
landing.feat4desc: Set your hours day by day. Your customers always know when you're open before making the trip.
landing.feat5desc: Manage your menu from your phone, tablet or computer. Designed to work everywhere, even offline.
landing.feat6desc: Let your customers place orders directly from your menu and make table reservations. Offer gift experiences with QR codes.
landing.showcaseSub: Every screen is designed to reduce clicks. Edit a dish in 3 seconds, manage categories by drag and drop.
landing.howSub: No developer needed, no training required. Follow these 3 steps and your menu is live.
landing.step0desc: Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card required. Your 14-day free trial starts immediately.
landing.step1desc: Add your categories, dishes, photos and prices. Customise the colours to match your brand. Simple and intuitive interface.
landing.step2desc: Print your QR code or share the link on your social media. Your customers access your menu from their phone.
landing.testiH2: They adopted it and never looked back
landing.testi0quote: Our menu is always up to date even during service. Customers love scanning and seeing the daily specials in real time. It truly changed our relationship with customers.
landing.testi1quote: I replaced my laminated menus in 20 minutes. The ease of use is impressive. I update my prices live during peak hours.
landing.testi2quote: The audit trail and role management are perfect for our chain of 3 restaurants. We know exactly who changed what and when.
landing.pricingSub: Start for free. Scale when you need to. Cancel whenever you want.
landing.pricingNote: 14-day free trial on all paid plans · No card required · Cancel in one click
landing.faqSub: A question not listed here? Write to us — we reply within 24h.
landing.faq0q: How does the free trial work?
landing.faq0a: Your trial starts at sign-up, no credit card needed. For 14 days you have access to all Pro features. At the end, you choose the plan that suits you.
landing.faq1q: Can I change my plan at any time?
landing.faq1a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time from your management dashboard. Changes take effect immediately.
landing.faq2q: How do my customers access the menu?
landing.faq2a: Each restaurant has a unique URL and QR code. Your customers scan the QR code or use the link — no app download required.
landing.faq3a: All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. We host in Europe and follow GDPR best practices. Your data is never shared.
landing.faq4a: No. The displayed price is all-inclusive. No per-transaction fees, no extra charges for updates, no surprises on your invoice.
landing.ctaSub: 14-day free trial · No card required · Cancel at any time
landing.footerTagline: The digital showcase for restaurants in Africa.
landing.heroTitle: The digital menu that drives sales
landing.heroSubtitle: Create your QR code menu in 5 minutes. Share it with your customers. Boost your sales.
landing.downloadSub: A mobile app for your customers, a desktop app to manage your restaurant — built for everyone.
landing.downloadMobileDesc: Your customers scan the QR code and browse your menu, place orders and pay directly from their phone.
landing.downloadDesktopDesc: Manage your menu, orders and team from Windows. Fast, smooth and always synced to your account.

faq.heroSub: Everything you need to know about SaeMenus. Can't find your answer?
faq.a0: SaeMenus is a SaaS platform that allows restaurants to create a digital menu accessible via QR code. Customers scan the QR code with their smartphone to view the menu, place orders or reserve a table — without any app to download.
faq.q1: How does the QR code work?
faq.a1: After creating your menu, SaeMenus automatically generates a unique QR code for your restaurant. You can download it, print it on your tables, physical menus or storefront. Each scan displays your menu in real time — any change you make is instantly visible to your customers.
faq.q2: Is an app required to use SaeMenus?
faq.a2: No. SaeMenus is accessible directly from any smartphone browser. Your customers don't need to install anything. On your end, the admin dashboard is accessible from a web browser on computer or mobile.
faq.a3: Yes, the Free plan is available without time limit. It lets you create a menu with up to 3 categories, generate your QR code and receive basic reservations. You can upgrade to a paid plan at any time from your dashboard.
faq.q4: What is the difference between plans?
faq.a4: The Free plan covers the essentials: digital menu + QR code. The Pro plan adds online orders, advanced reservations, detailed statistics and team management. The Enterprise plan adds API access, gift QR codes and dedicated priority support. See the Pricing page for full details.
faq.q5: Can I change plans at any time?
faq.a5: Yes. You can upgrade immediately from Dashboard → Subscription. The change takes effect instantly and you are only charged for the remaining period. For a downgrade, the change takes effect at the next renewal date.
faq.a6: Payments are monthly or annual (with 20% discount). We use CinetPay for secure payment processing. You receive an invoice by email at each renewal. No commitment: you can cancel at any time.
faq.q7: How many dishes can I add to my menu?
faq.a7: The Free plan allows up to 30 dishes. The Pro plan goes up to 200 dishes. The Enterprise plan is unlimited. Each dish can have a name, description, price, image and badges (New, Popular, Vegetarian, etc.).
faq.q8: Can I temporarily make certain dishes unavailable?
faq.a8: Yes. In the dashboard, you can enable or disable a dish with one click. A disabled dish no longer appears in the public menu but its data is preserved. Ideal for managing out-of-stock items or seasonal dishes.
faq.a9: JPEG, PNG and WebP are accepted. The maximum size is 5 MB per image. Images are automatically optimized and resized for fast loading on mobile. We recommend a 4:3 or 16:9 ratio for optimal display.
faq.q10: Can I have multiple menus (lunch, dinner, wine list)?
faq.a10: Yes. You can create as many categories as your plan allows. Organize them freely: Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks, Daily Special, Wine List… The display order is fully customizable by drag and drop.
faq.a11: With the Pro or Enterprise plan, your customers can add dishes to their cart directly from the menu and place an order by providing their name, phone number and table number. You receive orders in real time in your dashboard with status and details.
faq.a12: Customers can send a reservation request (date, time, number of guests, message) directly from the menu. You receive requests in your dashboard and can confirm or decline them. A confirmation email is automatically sent to the customer.
faq.q13: What is the Gift QR feature?
faq.a13: Available on the Enterprise plan, the Gift QR feature allows a customer to offer a meal to someone. They purchase a gift voucher, receive a unique QR code to give, and the recipient can order with this code during their visit to the restaurant.
faq.q14: Is the menu optimized for mobile?
faq.a14: Yes, that's the priority. SaeMenus is designed mobile-first. Your customers access the menu from their smartphone and enjoy a smooth, fast experience. Several visual templates are available (Classic, Magazine, Immersive, Zen, Bento) suited to all restaurant styles.
faq.q15: Is my menu always accessible if the internet is slow?
faq.a15: The menu is optimized for slow connections: compressed images, progressive loading and browser caching. Pages load quickly even with a 3G connection.
faq.a16: Yes, the Enterprise plan includes access to a documented REST API to integrate SaeMenus with your own system (POS, management software, etc.). The API allows you to retrieve orders, reservations and update the menu programmatically.
faq.ctaSub: Our team responds within 24 hours on weekdays.

guide.heroSub: Everything you need to know to create, configure and manage your digital restaurant in a few minutes.
guide.ctaSub: Create your menu in 5 minutes. No credit card required to get started.
guide.startIntro: Your menu is online in less than 5 minutes. Here's how.
guide.startStep1P: Go to saemenus.com/register. Enter your restaurant information: name, address, phone, and create your login with your email and a secure password.
guide.startStep2P: In Administration → Restaurant Info, add your logo, a description, your opening hours and your country's currency. This information appears at the top of your public menu.
guide.startStep3P: Start with the Free plan to test the platform. Upgrade to Pro when you want to activate online orders and advanced statistics.
guide.menuIntro: Build your menu in a few clicks. Categories, dishes, prices, images — all manageable from the dashboard.
guide.menuCard1P: Organize your menu into sections: Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks… Rearrange them by drag and drop.
guide.menuCard2P: Name, description, price, photo, badges (New, Popular, Vegetarian…) and availability status.
guide.menuCard3P: Every change is instantly visible to your customers. No manual publishing.
guide.menuCard4P: Out of stock? Disable a dish with one click. It disappears from the menu but its data is preserved.
guide.menuCaption: Menu items management view — list with active/inactive status
guide.appearanceIntro: Choose from 5 visual templates and adapt the colors to your identity.
guide.appearanceTip: Tip: The brand color is used for buttons, badges and accent elements of your menu. Choose it in line with your logo. Can be changed at any time from Restaurant Info → Brand Color.
guide.qrcodeIntro: Your QR code is generated automatically. Print it and place it on your tables.
guide.qrcodeStep1P: In Administration → Restaurant Info, you will find your QR code in the dedicated section.
guide.qrcodeStep2P: The QR code is available in high-resolution PNG format suitable for printing on physical media.
guide.qrcodeStep3P: Copy the unique URL of your menu to share on your social networks, Google My Business or WhatsApp.
guide.ordersIntro: With the Pro plan, your customers order directly from their smartphone. Orders arrive in real time in your dashboard.
guide.ordersFlow1Desc: They browse the menu, add dishes to the cart and confirm their order with their name and table number.
guide.ordersFlow2Desc: The order appears immediately in Administration → Orders with all the details.
guide.ordersFlow3Desc: Change the status: Pending → Preparing → Ready → Delivered. Full tracking.
guide.ordersCaption: Orders dashboard — real-time view with status filters
guide.reservationsIntro: Receive and manage reservation requests directly from your dashboard.
guide.reservationsPClient: A Reserve a table button is displayed on your public menu. The customer chooses the date, time, number of guests and can leave a message. No app to download.
guide.reservationsPAdmin: Requests arrive in Administration → Reservations with all the information. You can confirm or decline each request. A confirmation email is automatically sent to the customer.
guide.reservationsTip: Reservations can be filtered by date, status (Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled) and exported.
guide.teamIntro: Give your employees access to your dashboard according to their role.
guide.teamAdminLi3: Access to statistics and audit logs
guide.teamCashierLi4: No access to settings or billing
guide.teamStep1P: Click Invite a member. Enter your colleague's email and select their role.
guide.teamStep2P: They click the invitation link, create their password and immediately access the dashboard with their permissions.
guide.statsIntro: Understand your menu trends and identify your most popular dishes.
guide.statsCaption: Statistics dashboard — KPIs + weekly activity chart
guide.statsCard1P: Number of QR code scans and unique visits to your menu, by day and by week.
guide.statsCard2P: Ranking of your most ordered or most viewed dishes.
guide.statsCard3P: Revenue tracking generated via online orders over the selected period.
guide.statsCard4P: Identify the hours and days of the week when your menu is most viewed.
guide.financeIntro: Track all your financial flows: order revenue, manual entries and expenses by category. Interactive charts give you a clear view of your business health.
guide.financeCaption: Financial dashboard — KPIs, grouped bar chart and expense breakdown
guide.financeCard1P: Total revenue, expenses, net profit and margin percentage. Each indicator shows the change vs the previous period.
guide.financeCard2P: Record your expenses by category: Ingredients, Tools, Accessories or Other. Add a label, amount, date and notes.
guide.financeCard3P: Validated orders are integrated automatically. Also add manual entries (catering, direct sales…) for a complete picture.
guide.financeCard4P: Analyze your flows by day (by hour), 7 days, month, last 6 months or full year.
guide.financeStep1P: In your dashboard's side menu, click Finance. This section is reserved for Enterprise plan accounts.
guide.financeStep2P: Use the selector at the top right to filter: Today, 7 days, This month, 6 months or This year. KPIs and charts update instantly.
guide.financeStep3P: In the Expenses tab, click Add an expense. Select the category, enter the label, amount and date.
guide.financeStep4P: Switch to the Manual Revenue tab to enter income outside of orders: catering sales, special services, subsidies…
guide.financeTip: Tip: The donut chart on the right breaks down your expenses by category. If one category represents too large a share (e.g. Ingredients > 60%), it's a signal to renegotiate with your suppliers.
